title: Talent Acquisition Recruiter
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a Recruiter to join our APAC Integrated Talent Solutions (Talent Acquisition) team. In this role, you will support hiring across assigned business units by delivering end-to-end recruitment execution aligned to regional and global hiring priorities.

You will partner closely with hiring managers, candidates, and cross‑functional teams to deliver a high-quality, efficient, and consistent recruitment experience, while building strong foundational recruiting capability in a fast-paced environment.

Responsibilities

Deliver a strong hiring manager and candidate experience

  • Partner with hiring managers to understand business and role requirements, hiring timelines, and priorities
  • Manage the end-to-end hiring process for assigned requisitions, from intake to offer
  • Coordinate interviews and ensure interview teams are prepared and aligned
  • Act as a point of contact for candidates throughout the hiring process, ensuring clear communication and follow-through
  • Support a positive and professional candidate and hiring manager experience
  • Engage with Japanese speaking hiring managers and candidates as this role will manage Japan market. Hence proficiency in Japanese language is required

Effectively fill roles aligned with business needs

  • Screen and assess candidates against role requirements
  • Support sourcing efforts through direct sourcing, referrals, and coordination with sourcing partners
  • Build and maintain candidate pipelines across appropriate channels
  • Leverage recruiting tools and systems to support hiring efficiency and quality
  • Support diversity and representation goals through inclusive recruiting practices

Support talent acquisition processes and collaboration

  • Partner with recruiting operations and cross-functional teams to ensure smooth hiring execution
  • Maintain accurate and up-to-date data in the ATS (Workday)
  • Follow established recruitment processes, policies, and compliance standards
  • Contribute feedback and insights to improve recruitment processes and candidate experience

Qualifications

  • 4+ years of full-cycle recruiting experience in an in-house or agency environment
  • Experience supporting hiring across one or more business functions
  • Familiarity with sourcing techniques and recruitment tools
  • Strong organisational and time-management skills
  • Clear and professional communication skills
  • Ability to manage multiple requisitions and priorities effectively
  • Well-organised, adaptable, and collaborative team player
  • Proficient in spoken and written Japanese language as the new hire will work with Japanese speaking hiring managers and candidates

postedCompany.description:
EQUINIX ASIA PACIFIC PTE. LTD.

Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), connects more than 4,000 companies directly to their customers and partners inside the world’s most networked data centers. Today, enterprise, cloud, networking, digital media and financial services companies leverage the Equinix interconnection platform in over 30 strategic markets across the Americas, EMEA and Asia-Pacific. By connecting directly to their strategic partners and end users, customers are forming dynamic ecosystems inside Equinix. These interconnected ecosystems enable companies to optimize the performance of their content and applications and protect their vital digital assets.
